text.title: LLM Hallucination Test Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the hallucination test suite. Subagent must satisfy this before suite is shipped to CI.

field.name: cases_per_pattern
field.constraint: every pattern in pattern_classes has count >= 10

field.name: incident_conversion_log
field.constraint: ≥ 80% of hallucination incidents in last 90 days produced ≥ 1 case

forbidden.pattern: Pattern class missing OR not from the closed set (violates r1)
gold_label fields with vague language ("seems right", "looks ok", "good answer") (violates r4)
incident_conversion_log empty after 2+ hallucination incidents (violates r5)
cases with input_context AND query AND gold_label all missing (skeleton case)
expected_pass_rate_thresholds missing OR set to 100% (impossible to fail)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Sub-class within a pattern (e.g., fact_probes.named_entity vs fact_probes.date) for finer regression tracking; sub-classes still count toward the parent r2 minimum.
Add an LLM-judge as a SECONDARY scorer alongside the human gold label; never replaces the human.
Retire cases when business rule changes (e.g., regulation updates); record retirement_reason in case metadata.

list.item: All six pattern classes are present
Incident-conversion log shows ≥ 80% conversion in last 90 days
